OptionDescription.SourceString: At the end of the round, disables the ability for players to Matchmake into the Island. Only applies to published games that have matchmaking turned on in the Island settings. Beware it can take some seconds to Disable it if an Enable request was made recently.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: At the end of the round, disables the ability for players to Matchmake into the Island. Only applies to published games that have matchmaking turned on in the Island settings. Beware it can take some seconds to Disable it if an Enable request was made recently.
